positive: A stylized and abstract celestial forest scene, featuring glowing bioluminescent flora and deep cosmic elements. The primary composition is a central arrangement of interconnected, winding branches and crystalline structures forming a symmetrical, circular pattern. Use high-contrast silhouettes against a gradient background of midnight blue, deep violet, and shimmering teal. The lighting should emanate softly from the foliage and crystal veins, creating a strong glow effect (luminescence) without losing detail in the shadows. The overall style is Neo-Art Deco meets mystical nature, highly clean, intricate, and perfect for repetition or single-panel apparel print. Detailed linework, vector quality, ethereal glow, symmetrical composition, full color, digital painting.
negative: low quality, fuzzy, noise, blurry, text, watermark, signature, ugly, extra limbs, bad anatomy, asymmetry, cartoon, realistic photo, logos, symbols, copyrighted, graffiti
